title: Who is the LEAD FEMALE of End of Evangelion
display_title: Who is the LEAD FEMALE of End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Who is the LEAD FEMALE of End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by Xero759 » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:04 pm Personally I think it's Asuka, tho I know some would beg to differ. I'm curious as to peoples opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:08 pm Misato - without a doubt. Anno designed her that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:36 pm Misato Main characters are Shinji and Misato. EoE however is very Shinji-centered

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:47 pm Why does there have to be one at all...? Well, if you really need an "answer", figure it out this way: Calculate the sum of the screentime each of the three female leads gets. Whoever wins is your "lead". (Though would GNR go towards Rei's total and Eva-02 towards Asuka's?)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:55 pm Screen Time would go to Asuka. And my vote would go to Asuka. A lot goes between her a Shinji in EoE. Misato is just there to get shot. Rei is there to get rejected by Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Apr 02, 2008 4:00 pm Xero759 wrote: Who is the LEAD FEMALE of End of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Apr 02, 2008 4:15 pm Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 02, 2008 4:32 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Screen Time would go to Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Xero759 » Wed Apr 02, 2008 6:26 pm Wanted to put up a poll to see what the board thought, but I'm not given the option, must be cause of my rank. I figure most answers go Asuka Rei Misato Some combo Lilith(/Rei) Reichu wrote: Why does there have to be one at all...?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 02, 2008 6:46 pm I'm surprised no one has mentioned the Great and All Powerful/Knowing Yui-sama. EGF is a cult for her, after all. So, it's either her or fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Wed Apr 02, 2008 6:50 pm BrikHaus wrote: I'm surprised no one has mentioned the Great and All Powerful/Knowing Yui-sama. EGF is a cult for her, after all. So, it's either her or fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Apr 02, 2008 8:20 pm um...I seriously think attention was evenly divided between Misato, Rei, and Asuka.....arguably, arguably, Asuka got the most attention, and Misato was kind of supporting...but really I don't think you can say one was the biggest in just EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Kaasen » Wed Apr 02, 2008 11:16 pm I'm going to go with Asuka, solely based upon the fact that she was the only one who lived.

[]:             Quote Post by Steve » Thu Apr 03, 2008 4:16 am I largely agree with the idea that there isn't one. If there was, I think it would be between Asuka and Misato as they're explored more and are given more depth as "people". Rei and Yui-sama are obviously incredibly vital, but as "characters" in the traditional sense I think they're given less importance than the aforementioned others (although the line is much finer for Rei).

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Apr 03, 2008 4:17 am Maya, her vomit-stained performance carried the whole film for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Thu Apr 03, 2008 7:39 am Still certain it was Misato - Anno stated as such, as far as I recall. I think Reichu might actually have the statement.

[]:             Quote Post by EveAngel » Thu Apr 03, 2008 11:06 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Still certain it was Misato - Anno stated as such, as far as I recall. I think Reichu might actually have the statement.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Thu Apr 03, 2008 11:34 am Were Misato and Asuka giant white and nekked, i dont think so. Rei for lead.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 03, 2008 5:15 pm Kaasen wrote: I'm going to go with Asuka, solely based upon the fact that she was the only one who lived.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Apr 03, 2008 7:21 pm Reichu wrote: Kaasen wrote: I'm going to go with Asuka, solely based upon the fact that she was the only one who lived.
summary:
[]: Who is the LEAD FEMALE of End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by Xero759 » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:04 pm Personally I think it's Asuka, tho I know some would beg to differ. I'm curious as to peoples opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Apr 02, 2008 3:08 pm Misato - without a doubt. Anno designed her that way.

[]:       &nb
